requirement_topic.en: Radio Equipment Directive — CE Marking & ÚRSO National Enforcement (Slovakia)
requirement_topic.zh: 无线设备指令 — CE标志及ÚRSO国家执法（斯洛伐克）
requirement_topic.zht: 無線設備指令 — CE標誌及ÚRSO國家執法（斯洛伐克）

summary.en: Slovakia is an EU member state and Eurozone member; EU Radio Equipment Directive (RED) 2014/53/EU applies in full. CE marking is mandatory for all radio equipment placed on the Slovak market. The national competent authority for RED enforcement and spectrum management is ÚRSO (Úrad pre reguláciu elektronických komunikácií a poštových služieb — Regulatory Office for Electronic Communications and Postal Services), established under zákon č. 452/2021 Z. z. o elektronických komunikáciách (Electronic Communications Act, Slovakia). ÚRSO manages frequency spectrum allocation, type-approval coordination, and RED enforcement for radio and telecom equipment. Market surveillance for product safety is conducted by SOVA (Slovenská obchodná inšpekcia — Slovak Trade Inspection Authority). ÚNMS SR (Úrad pre normalizáciu, metrológiu a skúšobníctvo Slovenskej republiky — Slovak Office for Standards, Metrology and Testing) adopts EU harmonised standards as STN EN equivalents. For Wi-Fi 2.4 GHz (IEEE 802.11b/g/n/ax) and Bluetooth, the applicable harmonised standard is EN 300 328 v2.2.2. For 5 GHz Wi-Fi (IEEE 802.11a/n/ac/ax), EN 301 893 v2.1.1 applies. Compliance with these harmonised standards grants presumption of conformity with RED Art. 3.2. A signed EU Declaration of Conformity (DoC) must be available on request from ÚRSO or SOVA. Slovakia's role as a leading EU automotive and electronics manufacturing hub (Volkswagen Bratislava, Kia Žilina, Samsung SDI) sustains high volumes of electronics imports, making RED enforcement commercially significant. CCC, SRRC, and FCC are not recognised by ÚRSO or SOVA as substitutes for RED/CE.
summary.zh: 斯洛伐克是欧盟成员国及欧元区成员，欧盟无线设备指令（RED）2014/53/EU在全国全面适用。CE标志是向斯洛伐克市场投放所有无线电设备的强制要求。负责RED执法和频谱管理的国家主管机关是ÚRSO（Úrad pre reguláciu elektronických komunikácií a poštových služieb——斯洛伐克电子通信和邮政服务监管局），依据zákon č. 452/2021 Z. z.（斯洛伐克电子通信法）设立。ÚRSO负责频率频谱分配、型式核准协调以及无线电和电信设备的RED执法。产品安全的市场监管由SOVA（Slovenská obchodná inšpekcia——斯洛伐克贸易检查局）承担。ÚNMS SR（Úrad pre normalizáciu, metrológiu a skúšobníctvo Slovenskej republiky——斯洛伐克标准、计量和检测局）将欧盟协调标准采纳为STN EN等效标准。2.4 GHz Wi-Fi（IEEE 802.11b/g/n/ax）和蓝牙适用的协调标准为EN 300 328 v2.2.2；5 GHz Wi-Fi（IEEE 802.11a/n/ac/ax）适用EN 301 893 v2.1.1。符合上述协调标准即可推定符合RED第3.2条。须应ÚRSO或SOVA要求提供已签署的欧盟合格声明（DoC）。斯洛伐克作为欧盟领先的汽车及电子制造中心（布拉迪斯拉发大众、日纳基亚、三星SDI），电子产品进口量巨大，使RED执法具有重要商业意义。CCC、SRRC及FCC均不被ÚRSO或SOVA认可为RED/CE的替代认证。
summary.zht: 斯洛伐克是歐盟成員國及歐元區成員，歐盟無線設備指令（RED）2014/53/EU在全國全面適用。CE標誌是向斯洛伐克市場投放所有無線電設備的強制要求。負責RED執法和頻譜管理的國家主管機關是ÚRSO（Úrad pre reguláciu elektronických komunikácií a poštových služieb——斯洛伐克電子通信和郵政服務監管局），依據zákon č. 452/2021 Z. z.（斯洛伐克電子通信法）設立。ÚRSO負責頻率頻譜分配、型式核准協調以及無線電和電信設備的RED執法。產品安全的市場監管由SOVA（Slovenská obchodná inšpekcia——斯洛伐克貿易檢查局）承擔。ÚNMS SR（Úrad pre normalizáciu, metrológiu a skúšobníctvo Slovenskej republiky——斯洛伐克標準、計量和檢測局）將歐盟協調標準採納為STN EN等效標準。2.4 GHz Wi-Fi（IEEE 802.11b/g/n/ax）和藍牙適用的協調標準為EN 300 328 v2.2.2；5 GHz Wi-Fi（IEEE 802.11a/n/ac/ax）適用EN 301 893 v2.1.1。符合上述協調標準即可推定符合RED第3.2條。須應ÚRSO或SOVA要求提供已簽署的歐盟合格聲明（DoC）。斯洛伐克作為歐盟領先的汽車及電子製造中心（布拉迪斯拉發大眾、日納基亞、三星SDI），電子產品進口量巨大，使RED執法具有重要商業意義。CCC、SRRC及FCC均不被ÚRSO或SOVA認可為RED/CE的替代認證。

standards_or_laws: Zákon č. 452/2021 Z. z. o elektronických komunikáciách (Electronic Communications Act, Slovakia) — transposing RED and establishing ÚRSO as national competent authority
Nariadenie vlády SR č. 74/2016 Z. z. — Slovak government regulation implementing RED 2014/53/EU
EN 300 328 v2.2.2 — Wideband transmission systems; data transmission equipment operating in the 2.4 GHz ISM band (2.4 GHz Wi-Fi and Bluetooth)
EN 301 893 v2.1.1 — 5 GHz RLAN; requirements for harmonised use of 5 GHz spectrum
STN EN 300 328 / STN EN 301 893 — Slovak national adoptions of ETSI harmonised standards (ÚNMS SR)

summary.en: In China, wireless transmitters (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth) must obtain SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China) Type Approval under the MIIT/NRA framework, administered by the National Radio Administration. The primary domestic technical standards are YD/T 1127 series for 2.4 GHz spread-spectrum devices and GB 15629.11 for Wi-Fi (equivalent to IEEE 802.11). Telecom terminal equipment also requires a MIIT Network Access License (NAL). CCC is mandatory for IT equipment under CNCA-C17-01. Neither SRRC approval nor CCC satisfies the EU RED Art. 3.2 CE marking pathway enforced by ÚRSO in Slovakia.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线发射设备（Wi-Fi、蓝牙）须依据工业和信息化部/国家无线电管理局（NRA）的监管框架取得SRRC（国家无线电管理）型号核准。主要国内技术标准为2.4 GHz扩频设备适用的YD/T 1127系列及Wi-Fi设备适用的GB 15629.11（等同IEEE 802.11）。电信终端设备还须取得工信部进网许可证（NAL）。依据CNCA-C17-01，IT设备须强制进行CCC认证。SRRC批准和CCC均不满足ÚRSO在斯洛伐克执行的欧盟RED第3.2条CE标志路径要求。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線發射設備（Wi-Fi、藍牙）須依據工業和信息化部/國家無線電管理局（NRA）的監管框架取得SRRC（國家無線電管理）型號核准。主要國內技術標準為2.4 GHz擴頻設備適用的YD/T 1127系列及Wi-Fi設備適用的GB 15629.11（等同IEEE 802.11）。電信終端裝置還須取得工信部進網許可證（NAL）。依據CNCA-C17-01，IT設備須強制進行CCC認證。SRRC批准和CCC均不滿足ÚRSO在斯洛伐克執行的歐盟RED第3.2條CE標誌路徑要求。

standards_or_laws: MIIT/NRA SRRC Type Approval — mandatory pre-market radio licence for wireless transmitters in China
MIIT Network Access License (NAL) — mandatory for telecom terminal equipment sold in China
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — CNCA-C17-01 for IT equipment including Wi-Fi routers and IoT gateways
GB 15629.11 — Information technology; wireless LAN specifications (equivalent to IEEE 802.11)
YD/T 1127 series — Mobile communication terminal radio frequency test methods (MIIT)

gap.en: Chinese SRRC type approval, MIIT NAL, and CCC do not satisfy EU RED Art. 3.2 CE marking requirements enforced by ÚRSO in Slovakia. Fresh EN 300 328 / EN 301 893 test reports from an EU-accredited (or ILAC MRA-member) test laboratory are required. Key technical gaps: (1) 5 GHz DFS (Dynamic Frequency Selection) requirement under EN 301 893 for channels 52–140 mandatory for RLAN access points in the EU including Slovakia; (2) EIRP limits under EN 300 328 (100 mW / 20 dBm for 2.4 GHz) must be verified; (3) ETSI measurement methods for channel mask and occupied bandwidth differ from Chinese test protocols. Slovakia's position as a major EU automotive and electronics manufacturing hub (Volkswagen, Kia, Samsung SDI) means ÚRSO and SOVA conduct active market surveillance; non-compliant products are subject to withdrawal and import ban under RED Art. 40.
gap.zh: 中国SRRC型号核准、工信部进网许可证和CCC均不满足ÚRSO在斯洛伐克执行的欧盟RED第3.2条CE标志要求。须通过欧盟认可（或ILAC MRA成员）检测实验室重新取得EN 300 328 / EN 301 893检测报告。主要技术差距：（1）EN 301 893对52–140信道的5 GHz动态频率选择（DFS）要求，在包括斯洛伐克在内的欧盟范围内对RLAN接入点为强制要求；（2）须核验EN 300 328下的EIRP限值（2.4 GHz为100 mW/20 dBm）；（3）信道掩码及占用带宽的ETSI测量方法与中国测试规程不同。斯洛伐克作为欧盟重要的汽车及电子制造中心（大众、起亚、三星SDI），ÚRSO和SOVA开展积极的市场监管；不合规产品依据RED第40条须予撤市并禁止进口。
gap.zht: 中國SRRC型號核准、工信部進網許可證和CCC均不滿足ÚRSO在斯洛伐克執行的歐盟RED第3.2條CE標誌要求。須通過歐盟認可（或ILAC MRA成員）檢測實驗室重新取得EN 300 328 / EN 301 893檢測報告。主要技術差距：（1）EN 301 893對52–140信道的5 GHz動態頻率選擇（DFS）要求，在包括斯洛伐克在內的歐盟範圍內對RLAN接入點為強制要求；（2）須核驗EN 300 328下的EIRP限值（2.4 GHz為100 mW/20 dBm）；（3）信道掩碼及佔用頻寬的ETSI測量方法與中國測試規程不同。斯洛伐克作為歐盟重要的汽車及電子製造中心（大眾、起亞、三星SDI），ÚRSO和SOVA開展積極的市場監管；不合規產品依據RED第40條須予撤市並禁止進口。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — RED 2014/53/EU Art. 3.2; CE marking required before placement on Slovak market; enforced by ÚRSO (radio/spectrum) and SOVA (product safety market surveillance)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — SRRC Type Approval (NRA/MIIT) + MIIT NAL (telecom terminals) + CCC (IT equipment) required before sale or import in China

source.publisher: ÚRSO — Úrad pre reguláciu elektronických komunikácií a poštových služieb (Regulatory Office for Electronic Communications and Postal Services, Slovakia)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] RED Art. 3.2 radio performance CE marking is the primary mandatory requirement for Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and IoT devices entering Slovakia. ÚRSO enforces RED nationally; SOVA conducts product market surveillance. SRRC approval, MIIT NAL, and CCC are not recognised substitutes. Fresh EN 300 328 / EN 301 893 test reports from an EU-accredited laboratory and a signed Declaration of Conformity are required before first market placement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] RED第3.2条无线电性能CE标志是Wi-Fi、蓝牙及物联网设备进入斯洛伐克的首要强制要求。ÚRSO在全国执行RED；SOVA负责产品市场监管。SRRC批准、工信部进网许可证和CCC均不被认可为替代认证。须在首次市场投放前提供欧盟认可实验室出具的EN 300 328 / EN 301 893检测报告及已签署的合格声明。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] RED第3.2條無線電性能CE標誌是Wi-Fi、藍牙及物聯網裝置進入斯洛伐克的首要強制要求。ÚRSO在全國執行RED；SOVA負責產品市場監管。SRRC批准、工信部進網許可證和CCC均不被認可為替代認證。須在首次市場投放前提供歐盟認可實驗室出具的EN 300 328 / EN 301 893檢測報告及已簽署的合格聲明。
